stemHtml: On approach to Runway 25 at an airport just before sunset, the ATIS reports the visibility to be 3000 metres in haze, sky clear. According to ICAO Annex 3, the actual visibility experienced by the pilots will be...

options.b: At least 3 000 m in all directions.
options.c: More than 3 000 m in the runway direction.
options.d: Less than 3 000 m but not less than 1 500 m.
